subject: COMING SOON :: Lamplighter Legacy | 2024 Four-Story Construction | Ocala, FL
text:
A 102-Unit Boutique Class "A" Four-Story Multifamily Community Located in Ocala, FL (https://multifamily.cushwake.com/Listings/31823?RUID=00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000) The Cushman & Wakefield Florida Multifamily Advisory Group is pleased to present Lamplighter Legacy Apartments (“LL”), a 102-unit boutique Class “A” four-story multifamily community in Ocala, Florida. As the only Class "A" apartment community ever developed in the Downtown Ocala submarket, LL offers investors a rare opportunity to acquire an institutional-quality asset in one of Florida's highest growth corridors for both population and commerce influx. Located within walking distance of historic Downtown Ocala and adjacent to two of Marion County's largest employers, HCA Florida Ocala Hospital and AdventHealth Ocala Hospital, the property is positioned to benefit from exceptional long-term fundamentals in the nation's fastest-growing MSA between 2024 and 2025. Offering materials coming soon. Contact our team for early access.
